Authored by Gemini 3.1 Pro (Antigravity). Session 57502eb2-7f7b-4b9b-a849-49f016b08c95.

Resolves #11189

Introduced the unified `archiveRoot` configuration property into the GitHub Workflow MCP server as defined by the E''+S architecture for Phase 1 of Epic #11187. This centralizes the pathing resolution that previously resided downstream in multiple syncers.

Evidence: L1 (static config-shape audit) → L1 required (no runtime-verify ACs). No residuals.

## Deltas from ticket (if any)
None. Implemented exactly as requested.

## Test Evidence
`npm run test-unit -- test/playwright/unit/ai/mcp/server/github-workflow/ConfigCompleteness.spec.mjs` passed seamlessly, proving the singleton merges correctly and env bindings are applied for `NEO_MCP_GITHUB_ARCHIVE_ROOT` and the default config object.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] Swarm transition to AC2 execution.

## Operator Guidance
After pulling this change, you must:
1. Update your local `ai/mcp/server/github-workflow/config.mjs` (which is gitignored) to include the new `issueSync.archiveRoot` property if you are overriding defaults, or simply restart if using the template defaults.
2. Restart the GitHub Workflow MCP server for the new configuration shape to take effect.
